---
title: ""
page-layout: full
---

```{r, echo=FALSE, results='asis', message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
library(jsonlite)

mk_candidates <- function(filename) {
  base <- c(file.path(getwd(), "data", filename), file.path("data", filename))
  ci   <- tryCatch(knitr::current_input(), error = function(e) NULL)
  if (!is.null(ci) && nchar(ci) > 0)
    base <- c(file.path(dirname(ci), "data", filename), base)
  base
}

books    <- tryCatch(read_json(Find(file.exists, mk_candidates("books.json"))),    error = function(e) list())
scripts  <- tryCatch(read_json(Find(file.exists, mk_candidates("scripts.json"))),  error = function(e) list())
recursos <- tryCatch(read_json(Find(file.exists, mk_candidates("recursos.json"))), error = function(e) list())

cat(sprintf(
  '<script>const BOOKS_DATA=%s;const SCRIPTS_DATA=%s;const RECURSOS_DATA=%s;</script>',
  toJSON(books,    auto_unbox = TRUE),
  toJSON(scripts,  auto_unbox = TRUE),
  toJSON(recursos, auto_unbox = TRUE)
))
```

```{=html}
<div class="lecturas-layout">

  <!-- COLUMNA IZQUIERDA -->
  <div class="glass-intro">
    <h2 class="intro-title">Explorar</h2>
    <p class="intro-text">
      Todos los contenidos del sitio en un solo lugar.
      Filtra por temática para encontrar lecturas, scripts y recursos relacionados.
    </p>
    <div class="tag-chips-wrap" id="explorar-tags"></div>
  </div>

  <!-- COLUMNA DERECHA -->
  <div class="lecturas-cards" id="explorar-cards"></div>

</div>

<div class="pagination-wrap" id="explorar-pagination"></div>

<script>
/* ── helpers ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
function stars(n) {
  return '★'.repeat(n) + '☆'.repeat(5 - n);
}

var iconMap = {
  'instagram': 'fab fa-instagram', 'youtube':    'fab fa-youtube',
  'linkedin':  'fab fa-linkedin',  'twitter':    'fab fa-x-twitter',
  'github':    'fab fa-github',    'tiktok':     'fab fa-tiktok',
  'spotify':   'fab fa-spotify',   'periodico':  'fas fa-newspaper',
  'audio':     'fas fa-headphones','podcast':    'fas fa-podcast',
  'libro':     'fas fa-book',      'base-datos': 'fas fa-database',
  'script':    'fas fa-code',      'video':      'fas fa-video',
  'articulo':  'fas fa-file-alt',  'web':        'fas fa-globe',
  'herramienta':'fas fa-wrench',   'datos':      'fas fa-table',
  'repositorio':'fas fa-folder-open'
};
var colorMap = {
  'instagram': '#c13584', 'youtube': '#ff0000', 'linkedin': '#0077b5',
  'twitter':   '#1a1a2e', 'github':  '#24292e', 'tiktok':   '#010101',
  'spotify':   '#1db954'
};

/* ── datos unificados ─────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
var ALL_DATA =
  BOOKS_DATA.map(function(b) { return Object.assign({_type: 'book'}, b); })
  .concat(SCRIPTS_DATA.map(function(s) { return Object.assign({_type: 'script'}, s); }))
  .concat(RECURSOS_DATA.map(function(r) { return Object.assign({_type: 'recurso'}, r); }));

/* ── card unificada ───────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
function explorarCardHtml(item) {
  var leftCol, action;
  if (item._type === 'book') {
    leftCol =
      '<div class="book-cover-side">' +
        '<img src="' + item.cover + '" alt="Portada" class="book-img">' +
        '<div class="book-stars">' + stars(item.stars) + '</div>' +
      '</div>';
    action = '<a href="lecturas.html" class="download-btn">Ver en Lecturas →</a>';
  } else if (item._type === 'script') {
    leftCol =
      '<div class="script-ext-wrap">' +
        '<div class="script-ext">' + item.extension + '</div>' +
      '</div>';
    action = '<a href="' + item.download + '" class="download-btn" download>Descargar ↓</a>';
  } else {
    var icon  = iconMap[item.formato]  || 'fas fa-link';
    var color = colorMap[item.formato] || '#3b3458';
    leftCol =
      '<div class="script-ext-wrap">' +
        '<div class="resource-badge" style="background:' + color + '">' +
          '<i class="' + icon + '"></i>' +
        '</div>' +
      '</div>';
    action = '<a href="' + item.url + '" class="download-btn" target="_blank">Acceder →</a>';
  }
  return '<div class="book-card' + (item._type === 'script' ? ' script-card' : '') + '">' +
    leftCol +
    '<div class="book-meta">' +
      '<span class="entry-date">Añadido: ' + item.fecha + '</span>' +
      '<div class="book-title">' + item.title + '</div>' +
      '<div class="script-byline">' +
        '<span class="book-author">' + item.author + '</span>' +
        '<span class="script-sep">·</span>' +
        '<span class="book-year">' + item.year + '</span>' +
      '</div>' +
      '<p class="book-caption">' + item.caption + '</p>' +
      action +
    '</div>' +
  '</div>';
}

/* ── estado ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
var ITEMS_PER_PAGE      = 6;
var currentExplorarPage = 1;
var activeExplorarTag   = null;

/* ── chips con conteo ─────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
(function() {
  var tagCounts = {};
  ALL_DATA.forEach(function(item) {
    if (item.tags) item.tags.forEach(function(t) {
      tagCounts[t] = (tagCounts[t] || 0) + 1;
    });
  });
  var tags = Object.keys(tagCounts).sort();
  var el = document.getElementById('explorar-tags');
  if (!el) return;
  el.innerHTML =
    '<button class="tag-chip tag-chip--active" data-tag="" onclick="filterExplorar(null)">ver todo</button>' +
    tags.map(function(t) {
      return '<button class="tag-chip" data-tag="' + t + '" onclick="filterExplorar(\'' + t + '\')">' +
        t + ' <span class="chip-count">(' + tagCounts[t] + ')</span></button>';
    }).join('');

  /* pre-seleccionar desde URL hash (llegando desde el Home) */
  var hash = decodeURIComponent(window.location.hash.slice(1));
  if (hash && tagCounts[hash]) filterExplorar(hash);
  else renderExplorar();
})();

/* ── render ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
function renderExplorar() {
  var data = activeExplorarTag
    ? ALL_DATA.filter(function(item) { return item.tags && item.tags.indexOf(activeExplorarTag) > -1; })
    : ALL_DATA;
  var totalPages = Math.ceil(data.length / ITEMS_PER_PAGE) || 1;
  if (currentExplorarPage > totalPages) currentExplorarPage = 1;
  var start = (currentExplorarPage - 1) * ITEMS_PER_PAGE;
  document.getElementById('explorar-cards').innerHTML =
    data.slice(start, start + ITEMS_PER_PAGE).map(explorarCardHtml).join('');
  renderExplorarPagination(totalPages);
}

function renderExplorarPagination(totalPages) {
  var el = document.getElementById('explorar-pagination');
  if (!el) return;
  if (totalPages <= 1) { el.innerHTML = ''; return; }
  el.innerHTML = Array.from({length: totalPages}, function(_, i) {
    var p = i + 1;
    return '<button class="page-btn' + (p === currentExplorarPage ? ' page-btn--active' : '') +
      '" onclick="goToExplorarPage(' + p + ')">' + p + '</button>';
  }).join('');
}

function goToExplorarPage(p) {
  currentExplorarPage = p;
  renderExplorar();
  var el = document.getElementById('explorar-cards');
  if (el) el.scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth', block: 'start' });
}

function filterExplorar(tag) {
  activeExplorarTag   = tag;
  currentExplorarPage = 1;
  if (tag) history.replaceState(null, '', '#' + tag);
  else     history.replaceState(null, '', window.location.pathname);
  document.querySelectorAll('#explorar-tags .tag-chip').forEach(function(btn) {
    btn.classList.toggle('tag-chip--active', btn.dataset.tag === (tag || ''));
  });
  renderExplorar();
}
</script>
```
